title: Bee Removal in Larchmont, Westchester | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Larchmont, Westchester. Safe, humane bee hive removal from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for fast service!
intro: Dealing with a bee infestation in Larchmont? Best Pest Control NYC provides safe and effective bee removal services for homeowners and businesses throughout this beautiful Westchester community. Our licensed technicians specialize in humane bee hive removal and relocation, protecting both your property and these important pollinators.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Westchester County, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges Larchmont properties face with bee infestations. Our team uses eco-friendly methods and arrives quickly to handle bee problems in your home, historic estate, or waterfront property with minimal disruption to your daily routine.
localContext: Larchmont's tree-lined streets, historic manor homes, and proximity to Long Island Sound create ideal conditions for bee colonies to establish themselves in eaves, chimneys, and garden structures. From the Manor Park neighborhood to properties near Larchmont Manor Beach Club, our technicians are familiar with the area's distinctive architecture and landscape features that commonly attract bees.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Larchmont typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the hive location, size, and accessibility. Ground-level hives are usually less expensive, while those in chimneys, walls, or high eaves may be at the upper end of the range. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation over extermination. Our technicians safely remove the hive and relocate the colony to a suitable environment where they can thrive without posing a threat to people. Relocation is our preferred method as bees are vital pollinators and beneficial to the ecosystem.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive from my Larchmont property?
faqs.answer: We understand that bee infestations can be urgent, especially if family members are allergic. We typically offer same-day or next-day service in Larchmont. Most bee removal jobs are completed within 2-4 hours, depending on hive size and location. We'll also seal entry points to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: Is bee removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bee removal process is completely safe for your family and pets. We use protective equipment and proven techniques to minimize bee agitation during removal. We recommend that residents and pets remain indoors during the removal process as a precaution, but there is no need for you to vacate your home or use harmful chemicals.
